old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-uk36.1.4.1.2","title":"Implement transcript_3 using CBOR encoding of TH_2, ciphertext/plaintext, credential per Python and RFC","description":"Add transcript_3(th_2: \u0026[u8; 32], input: \u0026[u8], cred: \u0026[u8]) that builds input with cbor2 equivalent (cbor dumps of each part) then compute_th to match test vectors in edhoc.rs and python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py. Handle both plaintext and ciphertext cases.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T05:30:26.603918836Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T05:30:26.603918836Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-uk36.1.4.1.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-uk36.1.4.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-23T05:30:26.744439713Z","created_by":"AI Agent","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented transcript_3 with CBOR bstr encoding via encode_bstr helper matching Python cbor2.dumps and RFC 9528 for both plaintext/ciphertext input cases. Test vectors in edhoc.rs now pass. Verified with Python reference. Commit 93420b6f4.
